DPO'S ADD TO CAL MOTION RE PROGRESS REPORT FILED

DIST ATTNY SUPPLEMENTAL REPORT FILED TODAY
DA'S EC1043 BRADY MOTION FOR DISCOVERY, P & A, DEC FILED

/JAVS/INTC/TN STANLEY NAVARROGARCIA/TWS/CH3 ISS PROB 3 Y PJ 2D/CTS 2/IND/EF:TO COMPLETE 30 HOURS OF ANGER MANAGMENT COUNSELING/DEF:MUST NOT HARASS,STRIKE, THREATEN, ASSAULT, ALBA ABARCA, STANLEY N,, NICOLE N,/DEF:MAY HAVE PEACEFUL CONTACT WITH THE PROTECTED PERSONS NAMED ABOVE, AS AN EXCEPTIONTO THE NO-CONTACT OR STAY-AWAY PROVISION, ONLY FOR THE SAFE EXCHANGE OF CHILDREN AND COURT-ORDERED VISITATION AS STATED IN ANY FAMILY, JUVENILE, OR PROBATE COURT ORDER ISSUED AFTER THE DATE OF THIS ORDER IS SIGNED/SAORD/SATERM/       /VF2:150/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/COLLECT/OBEY/ACCEP/4019HALF/REMA//X:UPON SUCCESSFUL COMPLETION OF ANGER MANAGMENT COUNSELING, COMPLYING  WITH PROTECTIVE ORDER, AND PROPER FILING OF MOTION, PROBATION MAY BE  CONVERTED TO COURT PROBATION,/
